name: agent-relay
description: Agent-facing Codex plugin for Agent Relay session coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Shared status, claims, and handoffs for parallel sessions
interface.longDescription: Agent Relay gives Codex sessions a local machine-wide coordination layer. Agents can publish explicit status updates, inspect recent project context, claim independent work scopes, release claims, and create handoffs without reading each other's transcript history.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Relay to check project status
Publish a handoff for another session
